close_reasons.bd-h66tp.1: Completed: deterministic compaction admission decisions now gate background starts with reason coverage and proof evidence.
close_reasons.bd-h66tp.2: Completed: huge built-in tool outputs now spill into bounded session-scoped artifacts with compact references, degraded persistence markers, and session JSONL coverage.
close_reasons.bd-h66tp.3: Completed provider routing evidence with fail-closed metrics, cost hints, user override evidence, JSON projection, and TUI regression coverage.
close_reasons.bd-h66tp.4: Completed scheduler fairness replay coverage for hostcall, timer, stream, and event storms.
close_reasons.bd-h66tp.5: Completed: large-session TUI frame-budget telemetry now emits structured redaction-safe snapshots and covers conversation, tool preview, model selector, branch picker, and tree navigation regressions.
close_reasons.bd-h66tp.6: Completed: cancellation cleanup evidence is structured and covered by focused tests.
close_reasons.bd-h66tp.7: Completed: offline extension safety provenance is exposed on search/info/install/list surfaces with redacted provenance tests.

checklist.requirement: All third-wave runtime-intelligence child Beads are closed and mapped to concrete artifacts.
Memory-aware compaction admission is deterministic, reason-coded, and backed by proof evidence.
Huge built-in tool outputs spill into bounded session artifacts instead of unbounded provider-visible payloads.
Provider/model routing evidence exposes latency, errors, staleness, cost hints, and user override posture without secrets.
Extension scheduler replay proves hostcall, timer, stream, and event storms remain ordered and non-starving.
Large-session TUI frame-budget telemetry is redaction-safe and covers conversation, tool preview, model, branch, and tree surfaces.
Long-running tool and extension cancellation leaves structured evidence and avoids late-success records.
Offline extension search/info/install surfaces expose source, license, category, capability, risk, and freshness provenance.
Runtime-intelligence operator evidence is linked without promoting advisory evidence into release or drop-in claims.

evidence.requirement: Beads record child status, close reasons, and final-gate ownership.
Agent Mail reservations and messages are coordination signals, not implementation proof.
The closeout gate inspects already-captured artifacts and does not mutate runtime sources.
Heavy Cargo gates must prove RCH execution.
The staged UBS gate remains mandatory before the closeout commit.
Beads ledger reconciliation remains mandatory before the closeout commit.
Runtime-intelligence closeout is advisory prompt-to-artifact evidence only.
Passing closeout does not replace child tests, evidence, Beads, git, RCH, UBS, or CI.

checklist.requirement: Closeout source boundaries preserve Beads, Agent Mail, RCH, UBS, ledger, CI, child evidence, and claim-integrity authorities.
All implementation child commits are already pushed to origin/main and legacy origin/master before final closeout generation.

provided_quality_gates.command: RCH_VISIBILITY=verbose rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/amberosprey_bd_h66tp_8/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/amberosprey_bd_h66tp_8/tmp cargo test --test runtime_intelligence_closeout_gate_contract -- --nocapture
RCH_VISIBILITY=verbose rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/amberosprey_bd_h66tp_8/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/amberosprey_bd_h66tp_8/tmp cargo fmt --check

RCH_VISIBILITY=verbose rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/amberosprey_bd_h66tp_8/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/amberosprey_bd_h66tp_8/tmp cargo check --all-targets

RCH_VISIBILITY=verbose rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/amberosprey_bd_h66tp_8/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/amberosprey_bd_h66tp_8/tmp cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
timeout 120s ubs --staged --only=rust .; python3 scripts/check_ubs_staged_delta.py if baseline noisy

checklist.requirement: Required closeout quality gates passed, with every Cargo/Rust validation gate run through RCH.

claim_boundaries.allowed_claim: advisory prompt-to-artifact runtime-intelligence closeout evidence only

known_limitations: Agent Mail is coordination evidence only; reservations/messages do not replace Beads, source review, or validation gates.
Runtime-intelligence closeout is not release performance evidence, capacity evidence, benchmark evidence, or strict drop-in certification evidence.
A passing closeout gate is not permission to skip source-specific tests, RCH, cargo fmt, cargo check, cargo clippy, staged UBS, Beads ledger reconciliation, CI, or push verification.
